item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i see brains
there goes my friday night
i guess
looks kinda shady
i'm hoping the picture is unrelated
it was me.. weird fetish
so it was bunk viagra
what could go wrong?
not bad
severely hard
wait what
that kid is cooler than i'll ever be
(Judge is 6'7")
patrick bateman
good to know?
amen brother
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.dc:creator: WigglyBlondeNoodle

item.title: People will cry about anything
item.description: Why woke? Because they've included a slider to adjust the difficulty/speed of the game. "It's ruining the spirit of the game!" They cry. Doom has always had difficulty settings. What's more, you can crank the slider all the way up and it's harder/faster than baseline. I fucking hate people. I seriously want to hit people who use woke as an offensive term. I could at least see if they had rammed a bunch of LGBT content in (I wouldn't agree, but I could see where it would be deemed woke...especially if it contributed nothing) but for fuck's sake....a difficulty slider isn't woke
item.dc:creator: Syndicofberyl

item.title: The best public service commercial ever "Here's a poem I wrote for you..."
item.description: I was sifting through old videos I had saved. Refound one of my favorite wholesome commercial. Saved in May 2009. Enjoy
item.dc:creator: ProfessorDiscoSlacksandCorduroyTrousers

item.title: Thursday WHOLESOME DUMP :) Watch this is if you need your soul to smile #593
item.description:
1. "Son, I'm so proud right now!"
2. Arnold being asked to read famous movie lines in his own unique way!
3. Ahhh yes, a catfish in it's natural habitat
4. Doing a cute dance in between filming a scene
5. What emotional roller coaster of a video
6
7. Just a video of a trebuchet
8. Yo, can you fix my nails real quick too
9
10. Nature
11. The substitute professor came in to class today
12
13. Dog shows cat love
14. And finally something wholesome from myself! I've been working on this wacky narrative game called Do Not Press The Button and today I'm happy to announce that game will release next month - on 16th of April 2025! Please enjoy the new trailer I made to mark the occasion! And if you want to support small indie dev teams like me and my brother, please wishlist the game on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Part 1
15. Part 2 of the trailer: Currently my favorite meme is the ABSOLUTE CINEMA. Please honestly tell me if I've earned it, with this trailer? I mean it's B.A.F.T.A.* nominated!

item.title: First in, last out
item.description: When the Nazis were burning books, they started with LGBTQ stuff. When they started rounding people up for the camps they started with the LGBTQ population. History might not repeat, but it rhymes.

item.title: Eggs for everyone!!
item.description: It's not very much money but it's my money. This employer was super shitty to me and they shorted me on something but the person at the labour board said that the evidence that I provided was enough to proceed with a request. Hopefully they comply and that's that.

item.title: Can't take the DEI out of CO
item.description:
We gots legislation to protect black history. https://www.chalkbeat.org/colorado/2025/02/21/bill-would-create-black-history-standards-for-schools-amid-dei-attacks/
We gots legislation to help sick and disabled students get through school. https://leg.colorado.gov/bills/sb25-087#:~:text=The%20bill%20requires%20each%20institution,self%2Ddisclose%20the%20student's%20disability Meanwhile, in D.C.,
https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/1282 Motherfucker... all your flagged DEI words are just a list of Colorado's government agencies and academic departments. We're more likely to constitutionalize "DEI" than rename every government related organization in the state. Efficiency... you keep on using that word. I do not think it means what you think it means. ?
Hello from the Void. *Edit for sauce links
item.dc:creator: currentlywithoutimagination

item.title: Kitty loves dog friend
item.dc:creator: brownlumi

item.title: We set up Kitty Hospice for my sweet elder baby
item.description:
Shes checking out her new space. She seems happy to be away from the other cats and have her things so close. The room is her daddy’s office so it smells like him and she has one of his shirts. You know, I’ve had her since I was 17 and feed, water, and clean her but HE is her favorite.
She’s been getting confused and she’s starting to lose her vision. I don’t want her in large spaces unless I can monitor her.
I am hoping she’ll pass in her sleep cozy at home. She still purrs when I pet her, loves food, and can still hop up on things. If she seems to not be enjoying life anymore, I’ll take her in. Her name is Miguela and she’ll be 20 this year. She’s been the bestest kitty.
item.dc:creator: kittycrazy88

item.title: Get yours while they last!
item.description:
£19.39 ?!!! WTF?! But wait! These air fresheners are not only special, they fund those way cool anti-Elon ads that have been seen all around London (and beyond). https://bsky.app/profile/everyonehateselon.bsky.social
Get it? 19.39 matches the year. So Clever. :) https://www.gofundme.com/f/people-vs-elon-campaign
[link redacted because Imgur is censoring posts with *certain* links] Just go to the *Bio* section at Bluesky from the link above in the first image to get to this page... Honestly @Imgur this is why less people are bothering to post here (and I would nott even know if I had not seen someone complaining about this throttling/censoring of posts). :(
And just in time too! The Resistance is working. :) https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2025/mar/20/tesla-musk-trump-work-cybertruck-recall-dan-ives-protests
This is a UK protest because "Everyone Hates Elon" means all over the world, which is good because the US can use all the help it can get right now (and Musk is also Canadian and South African). To be honest though, the above is a *Tesla Takedown* event. But you too can join in even in the US, in fact, I encourage it: [link redacted because Imgur is censoring posts with *certain* links -- this one is from The Independent] What are you doing next Saturday (the 29th)?
[link redacted because Imgur is censoring posts with *certain* links -- this one is from VOX]
You too can be a part of the resistance on Saturday, March 29th, and beyond! [link redacted because Imgur is censoring posts with *certain* links -- get the link from the Wikipedia page below because Wikipedia isn't a wuss about outside links like Imgur is]
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tesla_Takedown
A few more of the genius ads by *Everyone Hates Elon* campaign
This is actually another action group called, *Overthrow Musk* but I can't find a link for them (not that @Imgur would let me post it)
If enough people show interest maybe they'll make more of these great air fresheners, and then *Everyone Can Hate Elon* as they will be everywhere! :)
This is so old, yet still so relevant.
item.dc:creator: duoplicity

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1306 (out of service)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I decided to try adding a few roasted juniper berries to my coffee this morning, and OH WOW, this was a HORRIBLE idea.
Heroes through time.
But yeah, it is MAJORLY more bitter than usual to the point that it is not my jam. I tried it because apparently a lot of early white settlers roasted the berries to use as a coffee substitute, and so I was curious and, uh, yeah. This is bad. For me, anyway, and I like my coffee "black."
Working my way slowly through Disco Elysium and I'm enjoying it. Doing a sort of communist-apocalypse cop.
Oh, hell this is exactly how I feel right now
She would have.
Reading and watching videos about the LBK collapse in Neolithic Europe this morning. Because I worry something like that may happen to my country in the next few years unless we collectively pull our heads out of our arses.
Cloaaaaca.
Me in the shower this morning.
So many massacre sites from this period. Herxheim, Schletz....
Anyway. It's fine. Totally fine. Everything is absolutely okay!
Yup.
This guy was clearly a Phoenician merchant from Tyre in a past life.
I'm down for being eaten by birds.
Yeah this tracks.
Jurassic seas, I think
When I die, I hope someone plays the Brocelïande version of the Lament for Boromir. It is sad and beautiful. Always makes me cry.
The harvest has been good this year for them.
Listen. The Great Men* of History, generally, are Complete Assholes** who take advantage of long-running dynamics and structural forces and, by doing so, change their world.*** *and women **Even if they do make things better for their people specifically, e.g. Ghengis Khan ***often by fucking up the world irrevocably for other peoples/nations, see Alexander III of Macedon and the Achaemenid Persians.
This reminds me, I keep forgetting to ask my mom if she gave me both parts of the measles vaccine when I was a kid. I imagine she would have: she was a nurse after all, and a good one.
Yeah this fits
This refers to a study that looked at relative bone density between these species in an effort to try and determine what their possible niches were.
Yeap.
Bwahahahahha.
What with the cultists and dawnguard, yeah, seems that way.
Accurate.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Pickle. Pickle. Peek-a-boo! Fuck you. Oh my gawd. Good boy!" [Kissing noises] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
